identity.name: Reach
identity.aesthetic: Swiss Brutalist x Old Money Tech
identity.description: A minimal, dark-mode infrastructure for human reachability. It replaces the noise of email with the silence of logic.

rules.headings: Use 'Instrument Serif' for all major headings (H1, H2). It represents the 'Human Identity'. Keep it large and elegant.
rules.body: Use 'Manrope' for all UI text, descriptions, and form labels. It represents 'Clarity'.
rules.logic: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for rules, policies, prices, and code-like elements. It represents 'Logic'.
rules.weights: Avoid bold weights. Use Light (300) or Regular (400) for a premium feel.

usage.primary: Use Signal Amber (#F59E0B) ONLY for high-value actions (Pay, Confirm) or critical alerts.
usage.background: Almost pure black (#050505). Avoid grey backgrounds.
usage.surface: Use borders (1px solid #262626) to define areas, not background colors.
usage.text: High contrast white (#EDEDED) for reading, muted grey (#A1A1AA) for metadata.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers. Don't cramp the UI.

strategies.name: The Tetris Grid
strategies.description: Asymmetric grid. Hero identity block (col-span-2 row-span-2), Rule blocks (col-span-1), Stats (col-span-1).

strategies.name: The Control Room
strategies.description: Dense, data-heavy grid. 1px borders between cells. No gaps.

inputs.style: Minimalist. No background. Bottom border only (border-b border-white/20) OR deep matte (bg-white/5).
inputs.focus: Focus ring should be sharp, not glowing.

cards.style: No shadow. 1px border (border-white/10). Transparent or very dark background (bg-black/40).

visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture to the background to kill the digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glass: Use backdrop-blur-xl for sticky headers and overlays.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for active states or high-value cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to the <head> of index.html or top of index.css.
2. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Replace the content of 'src/index.css' with the provided CSS variables.
3. FORCE DARK MODE: Ensure the app defaults to dark mode. Add 'dark' class to the html or body tag.
4. USE SHADCN: Use the existing shadcn components but override their styles via className to match the 'Sharp & Minimal' aesthetic (rounded-none, border-only).
5. NO GRADIENTS: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or the provided texture images.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
7. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' approach for the dashboard. Avoid simple lists.
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover states to everything. Opacity change or border color change.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
